recommendations.title: Memoir of a Murderer
recommendations.overview: A former serial killer with Alzheimer's fights to protect his daughter from her mysterious boyfriend who may be a serial killer too.

recommendations.title: A Company Man
recommendations.overview: A contract killer becomes disenchanted with his line of work and spares the lives of his two latest would-be-victims. But the assassination company he works for has no intentions of letting him quit.

recommendations.title: Wishing Stairs
recommendations.overview: A staircase leading to a schoolgirls' dormitory usually has 28 steps, but sometimes a 29th step appears. Any wish you make while standing on this step comes true, even if it must come true in the most horrific way possible.

recommendations.title: The Mimic
recommendations.overview: The mother of a missing child takes in a lost girl she finds in the woods, but soon begins to wonder if she is even human.

recommendations.title: Next Sohee
recommendations.overview: A female detective investigates the cause of a high school girl’s death and uncovers a disturbing truth.

recommendations.title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
recommendations.overview: A story about a mentally ill man wrongfully imprisoned for murder and his relationship with his 6 year old daughter.

recommendations.title: The Suspect
recommendations.overview: Betrayed and on the run, a former North Korean agent tries to seek revenge on the man who killed his wife, find his missing daughter, and uncover the secrets hidden inside the eyeglasses of a dead man.

recommendations.title: Aloners
recommendations.overview: Jina is the top employee at a credit card company call center. She avoids building close relationships, choosing instead to live and work alone – until she is suddenly tasked with training a new recruit.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Officer Black Belt
recommendations.overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.
